title: RealMLP diversity expert with p_drop 0.08
summary: Add a RealMLP expert using p_drop=0.08 as a diversity component.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one extra RealMLP expert with p_drop changed from the parent value to 0.08, leaving all other parameters and folds stable. Blend the expert lightly with the parent prediction.
expected_effect: Use dropout variation to create a complementary neural model without changing the main core.
risk: The dropout expert may be weaker and too correlated to help.
